name: Falin Thorden
description: __Height:__ 170 cm (5'7") Falin is Laios's younger sister and a mage specializing in support spells. She is a tall-man from the Northern Continent. Falin is a very kind, caring, and considerate person who doesn't want to hurt others. She extends this kindness even to the restless dead, who she has been attuned to since childhood. name: Michiru Kagemori
description: A tanuki-human high school student who secretly escaped to Anima City. She is communicative and has a bright and cheerful personality. (Source: Official Website)

name: Sayaka Kanamori
description: Asakusa’s classmate who is tall and long-legged. Though she has neither interest nor knowledge of anime, she somehow took interest in Asakusa and hangs out with her. Kanamori loves the activity which makes money and she tries to find the way even in small talk. After starting up Eizouken, she takes on the role of producer, being the only realist in the team, and proves herself through negotiating with the school and student council. She suffers from congenital heart disease which limits her physical ability. She appears to possess a "go with the flow" attitude as she accepts most situations with no protest though she voices her dislike of boring situations after Katsuragi noted of the class scores. name: Osaragi
description: __Height:__ 175 cm Osaragi is an assassin and a new member of the Order, a group of powerful assassins that work under the JAA.

name: Mizuki
description: A snake familiar at the Yonomori shrine. Nanami saved his life from her cruel classmates by releasing him out a window, he fell in love with her, so he left an engagement mark on her wrist. After a day, he arrives at her school and whisks her away to the shrine, which she is unable to escape from. Unlike other snakes, he was apparently raised in a greenhouse and has little knowledge of how most snakes behave. Mizuki is also very lonely because his god has vanished; she once existed when people v

name: Ushio Kofune
description: __Height:__ 162 cm Ushio Kofune is the main female protagonist of the Summertime Rendering series. She lives in Hitogashima, she lost her life in a maritime accident while trying to save Shiori from drowning in the sea. Her death acts as the starting point of the story, with Shinpei returning home to attend her funeral.

name: Coco
description: She is a young girl who becomes an apprentice witch under the witch Qifrey after her initial accidental use of forbidden magic turned her mother to crystal. She hopes to search the Tower of Books for the book containing the magic, in order to reverse its effects on her mother. She is quite a dork for magic, with a child-like (even for her age) widen eyed look whenever she sees things that are common for every other witch. The very magic that inspired her was simple magic made by Qifrey's watcher

name: Eijun Sawamura
description: __Height__: 175 cm (5'9'') Eijun Sawamura comes from the prefecture of Nagano where he played baseball at Akagi Junior High. After their last match, he was scouted by Takashima Rei that decided his new journey being a first-year high school student of Seidou High School in Tokyo. He is a left-handed southpaw relief pitcher who throws with his feelings and is never ashamed to show everyone what is on his mind. Later on, she is taught various things, and is eventually able to communicate with other people. ~!She is a Chobit, a legendary Persocom that is capable of thinking independently and feeling human emotions. name: Hinata Tachibana
description: __Height:__ 153 cm Hinata Tachibana is the girlfriend of Takemichi Hanagaki who is the primary reason for Takemichi's desire to change the past. In 2005, Hinata is a 14 year old girl. name: Sakamoto
description: A black cat who wears a scarf created by the [Professor](https://anilist.co/character/41055), which allows him to speak. Being technically older than both [Nano](https://anilist.co/character/10422) and the Professor, he speaks in a condescending tone towards them, though he occasionally succumbs to his catlike habits. ~!In the last episode, it is revealed that Sakamoto used to be [Nakamura](https://anilist.co/character/44126)'s cat and was called "Taisho". name: Bad
description: Bad (バッド, Baddo), also known by his hero alias Metal Bat (金属バット, Kinzoku Batto), is the S-Class Rank 15 professional hero for the Hero Association. Metal Bat is a young man with black hair styled in a pompadour, and dark eyes that emphasize his hot temper. Metal Bat has a great deal of confidence in himself, stating that he did not care whether a threat is a Demon or Dragon level. Like Saitama, he doesn't care about his rank, and accidentally kills his enemies faster than he intended.

name: Alpha
description: __Race:__ Elf Alpha is the second-in-command of Shadow Garden. After being cured of Demon Possession by [Cid Kagenou](https://anilist.co/character/136837/Cid-Kagenou), she would devote her life to his cause, becoming the first member to be recruited into his organization, Shadow Garden. ~!She is the descendant of the elf [Hero Olivier](https://anilist.co/character/204203/Olivier).!~

name: Arsène Lupin III
description: Lupin III Is the grandson of Arsène Lupin I. He is the world's most wanted thief. Often in his adventures, he takes it upon himself and his gang to foil other criminals engaged in more serious crimes. He sometimes appears incompetent, but mostly as a charade to catch his opponents off guard. While he has been arrested and thrown in jail on a number of occasions, he has always managed to break out. name: Ouran Nakagawa
description: A girl in her third year of high school. She is [Kadode](https://anilist.co/character/88566/Koyama-Kadode)'s best friend. name: Reno Ichikawa
description: He briefly worked at Monster Sweeper Inc, where he met and befriended Kafka Hibino. After witnessing Kafka's transformation, Reno helped him enter the Defense Force and joined with him. ~!He was a member of the Third Division and after destruction of Tachikawa Base he was transferred to the Fourth Division.!~

name: Hinami Fueguchi
description: __Height:__ 148 cm - 152 cm (4'10" - 4'11") Hinami is a child ghoul whose parents were killed by ghoul investigators. Before, she and her mother seek help from the owner of the Antique Cafe to acquire food. Hinami is initially quite shy, but when she opens up, she is cheerful and earnest. Ken helps her learn kanji, as she cannot attend school, and is very eager to learn. Currently, she is living together with Touka Kirishima.

name: Jellal Fernandes
nativeName: ジェラール・フェルナンデス
description: Jellal is a young man whose most prominent features are his blue hair and a red tattoo above and under his right eye, which he has had since his childhood. He is introduced under the alias of Siegrain, a young member of the Magic Council and can be considered the main antagonist of the series.

name: Komugi
description: Komugi is a blind girl who is a genius at Gung-gi, a fictional board game of Hunter x Hunter. name: Nasa Yuzaki
description: __Height:__ 169.5 cm __Likes:__ Math, Physics, Finances Kindhearted, charismatic, and intelligent, albeit only in certain areas. Nasa Yuzaki decided he had no need for a high school education, and, well, he was mostly right. He is the type of person who would worry if his friends got hurt when they tripped over a pebble, while he ended up falling down a cliff. He is very in love with his wife.

name: Anzu Hoshino
description: Anzu Hoshino is the protagonist who bears the "anti-heroine" attribute. She is a high school first year who claims her 3 great desires are video games, cat, and chocolate. She has no interest in real life romance and has been counter-measuring all the shojo manga-like situations conspired by Riri. She is logical and a very caring person who can't leave her troubled friends. Her biggest fear are cockroaches.

name: Madara
description: A mysterious feline spirit. Madara was sealed in a shrine until he was accidentally released by Natsume. Because Madara was trapped in a material form for so long, Madara ordinary takes on the shape of a maneki neko (lucky cat), leading Natsume to nickname him Nyanko-sensei. In this form, other people can see him, leading for Natsume having to ask his guardians if he could keep him as a pet.
